title: Compressed Barrels
body:
This mod adds Compressed Barrels, which are composed of five barrels and four iron ingots, capable of storing 186 stacks of items.
Compatible with Simple Storage or Tom's Simple Storage.

Language Support：
English
Simplifie Chinese
Traditional Chinese (Taiwan, Hong Kong)
Japanese
German
Italian
French
Japanese
Russian

中国玩家可以看这里：https://www.mcmod.cn/class/6436.html
